query: SELECT DISTINCT a.tipoArquivo, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM arquivos a WHERE a.convenioId = 30001 GROUP BY a.tipoArquivo
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT DISTINCT a.tipoArquivo, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM arquivos a WHERE a.convenioId = 30001 GROUP BY a.tipoArquivo
